# Ghar Ka Khana - Official Website Development Prompt

> **Purpose**: This document outlines the complete requirements for building a professional website for the **Ghar Ka Khana** app, specifically designed to meet **Razorpay compliance requirements** and serve as the official landing page for the app.

---

## 📋 Project Overview

**Ghar Ka Khana** (घर का खाना - "Home Food") is a homemade food delivery app that connects hungry customers with local home chefs. The app allows users to order authentic, freshly-prepared home-style meals directly from trusted home kitchens in their neighborhood.

### Business Model
- **Users**: Order homemade food from nearby home chefs
- **Home Chefs**: Local home cooks who prepare and sell homemade meals
- **Delivery**: Real-time order tracking with delivery service

---

## 🎯 Website Objectives

1. **Razorpay Compliance** - Meet all mandatory requirements for payment gateway activation
2. **App Promotion** - Serve as the official landing page with app download links
3. **Trust Building** - Establish credibility with professional legal pages and company information
4. **SEO Optimization** - Rank for relevant food delivery keywords

---

## 📱 Required Pages

### 1. **Home Page** (`index.html`)
The main landing page should be visually stunning and conversion-focused.

#### Hero Section
- **Headline**: Catchy tagline like "Homemade Food, Delivered Fresh" or "Taste the Love of Home Cooking"
- **Subheadline**: Brief value proposition (2-3 lines max)
- **App Screenshot/Mockup**: Show the app interface prominently
- **Download Buttons**: 
  - Google Play Store button (with actual link when available)
  - Apple App Store button (for future iOS release, can show "Coming Soon")
- **Animated elements**: Use Lottie animations or CSS animations for engagement

#### Features Section
Highlight 4-6 key app features with icons:
- 🏠 **Authentic Home Food** - Real homemade meals, not restaurant food
- 👨‍🍳 **Verified Home Chefs** - All cooks are verified for quality & hygiene
- 📍 **Local Kitchens** - Order from home chefs near you
- 🚀 **Fast Delivery** - Fresh food delivered hot to your door
- 💳 **Secure Payments** - Pay securely via Razorpay
- ⭐ **Ratings & Reviews** - Choose based on real customer feedback

#### How It Works Section
3-step visual process:
1. **Browse Menus** - Explore local home chefs and their menus
2. **Place Order** - Select your favorites and checkout securely
3. **Enjoy Fresh Food** - Hot homemade meals delivered to your door

#### Testimonials Section (Optional)
- 3-4 customer testimonials with names and photos
- Star ratings

#### Call-to-Action Section
- Final download push with app store buttons
- Optional: Email subscription for launch updates

#### Footer
- Navigation links to all pages
- Social media links (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter)
- Copyright notice
- "Made with ❤️ in India"

---

### 2. **About Us Page** (`about.html`)
> ⚠️ **RAZORPAY MANDATORY**

#### Company Information
- **Company/Brand Name**: Ghar Ka Khana
- **Mission Statement**: Bringing the taste of home-cooked meals to everyone
- **Vision**: Empower home chefs to earn from their culinary skills while providing healthy, authentic meals to busy individuals
- **Story**: Brief narrative about why Ghar Ka Khana was created

#### Team Section (Optional)
- Founder/Team member information with photos
- Brief bios

#### Values Section
- Quality & Hygiene
- Supporting Local Communities
- Authentic Home Cooking
- Customer Satisfaction

---

### 3. **Contact Us Page** (`contact.html`)
> ⚠️ **RAZORPAY MANDATORY**

#### Contact Information
- **Email**: support@gharkakhana.in (or actual support email)
- **Phone**: Customer support number (if available)
- **Business Hours**: e.g., "9 AM - 9 PM IST, Monday - Sunday"
- **Office Address**: Registered business address

#### Contact Form
Fields:
- Full Name (required)
- Email (required)
- Phone (optional)
- Subject (dropdown: General Inquiry, Order Issue, Partner with Us, Feedback, Other)
- Message (textarea, required)
- Submit button

#### Map (Optional)
- Embedded Google Maps showing office location

#### Social Links
- Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn

---

### 4. **Privacy Policy Page** (`privacy-policy.html`)
> ⚠️ **RAZORPAY MANDATORY**

This page must be comprehensive and cover:

#### Information Collection
- Personal info (name, email, phone, address)
- Payment information (handled by Razorpay)
- Location data (for delivery and chef discovery)
- Device information
- Order history and preferences

#### How We Use Your Information
- Processing and delivering orders
- Communicating with you (order updates, support)
- Improving our services
- Marketing (with consent)
- Legal compliance

#### Information Sharing
- With Home Chefs (for order fulfillment)
- With Delivery Partners
- With Payment Processor (Razorpay)
- With Service Providers (analytics, cloud hosting)
- Legal requirements

#### Data Security
- Encryption measures
- Secure servers
- Limited access

#### User Rights
- Access your data
- Update/correct data
- Delete account
- Opt-out of marketing

#### Cookies & Tracking
- Types of cookies used
- How to manage cookies

#### Third-Party Services
- Razorpay for payments
- Firebase/Supabase for backend
- Google Analytics (if used)

#### Children's Privacy
- Service is not for under 18 (or 13)

#### Policy Updates
- How users will be notified of changes

#### Contact for Privacy
- Email for privacy inquiries

---

### 5. **Terms and Conditions Page** (`terms-and-conditions.html`)
> ⚠️ **RAZORPAY MANDATORY**

#### Acceptance of Terms
- By using the app/service, users agree to terms

#### Service Description
- What Ghar Ka Khana provides (platform connecting users with home chefs)
- We are a facilitator, not a restaurant

#### User Accounts
- Registration requirements
- Account security responsibilities
- Accurate information requirement

#### Ordering & Payments
- How orders work
- Payment processing via Razorpay
- Pricing and taxes
- Order confirmation process

#### Cancellation & Modifications
- Order cancellation policy (time limits)
- Modification requests
- Chef's right to accept/reject orders

#### User Responsibilities
- Legal age requirement
- Accurate delivery information
- Respectful behavior

#### Prohibited Activities
- Fraudulent orders
- Harassment
- Misuse of platform

#### Intellectual Property
- Trademarks and copyrights
- User-generated content (reviews)

#### Limitation of Liability
- Food quality responsibility (Home Chef)
- Platform limitations
- Maximum liability cap

#### Indemnification
- User indemnifies Ghar Ka Khana

#### Dispute Resolution
- Governing law (India)
- Jurisdiction
- Arbitration clause (optional)

#### Termination
- Right to terminate accounts
- Effect of termination

#### Amendments
- How terms may be updated

---

### 6. **Refund & Cancellation Policy Page** (`refund-policy.html`)
> ⚠️ **RAZORPAY MANDATORY**

#### Order Cancellation
- **By Customer**:
  - Before Home Chef starts cooking: Full refund
  - After cooking starts: 50% refund or no refund (specify)
  - After dispatch: No refund
- **By Home Chef**:
  - Full refund if chef cancels
  - Alternative suggestions if available

#### Refund Eligibility
- Wrong order delivered
- Quality issues (with evidence/photos)
- Missing items
- Late delivery (optional policy)
- Hygiene concerns

#### Non-Refundable Situations
- Change of mind after delivery
- Taste preferences (subjective)
- Customer unavailable at delivery

#### Refund Process
- How to request (in-app / email)
- Required information (order ID, photos if quality issue)
- Investigation timeline (1-3 business days)
- Refund timeline (5-7 business days back to original payment method)

#### Refund Methods
- Original payment method
- App wallet credits (if applicable)
- No cash refunds

#### Contact for Refunds
- Support email
- In-app support option

---

### 7. **Pricing Page** (Optional - `pricing.html`)
Can be included in About or separate:

#### For Customers
- No subscription fees
- Pay per order
- Delivery charges (if any)
- Platform/service fees (if any)

#### For Home Chefs
- Commission structure
- Payout schedule

---

## 🎨 Design Requirements

### Brand Colors
Based on existing GKK brand from `user-confirm-web`:
- **Primary Orange**: `#E85D04` (warm, appetizing)
- **Dark Orange**: `#C44D00`
- **Light Orange**: `#FF8C42`
- **Background Cream**: `#FFF3E0`
- **Success Green**: `#059669`
- **Text Dark**: `#1a1a1a`
- **Text Gray**: `#6b7280`
- **White**: `#FFFFFF`

### Typography
- **Headings**: Fraunces (or similar serif - warm, friendly)
- **Body**: DM Sans (clean, readable)

### Design Aesthetic
- **Warm & Inviting**: Appeal to food lovers
- **Modern & Clean**: Professional appearance for Razorpay
- **Mobile-First**: Fully responsive design
- **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

### Animations
- Subtle hover effects
- Scroll-reveal animations
- Lottie animations for food/cooking elements
- Smooth transitions

### Imagery
- High-quality food photography
- Indian home-cooked meal images
- App screenshots/mockups
- Icons for features

---

## 🔧 Technical Requirements

### HTML/CSS/JS
- Semantic HTML5
- Vanilla CSS (or TailwindCSS if preferred)
- Vanilla JavaScript for interactions
- No heavy frameworks needed for static site

### Performance
- Optimized images (WebP format)
- Lazy loading for images
- Minified CSS/JS
- Fast load times (< 3 seconds)

### SEO
- Meta titles and descriptions for each page
- Open Graph tags for social sharing
- Schema.org structured data (LocalBusiness, MobileApplication)
- Sitemap.xml
- robots.txt

### Hosting
- Can be hosted on Netlify (like existing `user-confirm-web`)
- HTTPS required for Razorpay

### Analytics (Optional)
- Google Analytics
- Microsoft Clarity (for heatmaps)

---

## 📂 File Structure

```
gharkakhana-website/
├── index.html
├── about.html
├── contact.html
├── privacy-policy.html
├── terms-and-conditions.html
├── refund-policy.html
├── css/
│   ├── style.css
│   └── normalize.css
├── js/
│   └── script.js
├── images/
│   ├── logo.svg
│   ├── app-screenshot.png
│   ├── food-hero.webp
│   ├── google-play-badge.png
│   └── app-store-badge.png
├── fonts/ (if self-hosted)
├── sitemap.xml
├── robots.txt
└── 404.html
```

---

## ✅ Razorpay Compliance Checklist

| Requirement | Page | Status |
|-------------|------|--------|
| Company/Business Name | About, Footer | ⬜ |
| Contact Information | Contact | ⬜ |
| Email Address | Contact, Footer | ⬜ |
| Phone Number | Contact | ⬜ |
| Physical Address | Contact, Footer | ⬜ |
| Privacy Policy | privacy-policy.html | ⬜ |
| Terms & Conditions | terms-and-conditions.html | ⬜ |
| Refund/Cancellation Policy | refund-policy.html | ⬜ |
| Pricing/Cost Information | Home, Pricing | ⬜ |
| Website on HTTPS | All | ⬜ |
| Working Website Links | All | ⬜ |

---

## 🚀 App Download Links

### Placeholders (Update when available)
```
Google Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.gharkakhana.app
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/ghar-ka-khana/id123456789
```

### Direct APK Download (Optional)
If Play Store link isn't ready, can provide direct APK download button.

---

## 📝 Content Notes

1. **Language**: English with Hindi accents/phrases where appropriate
2. **Tone**: Warm, friendly, trustworthy, professional
3. **Imagery**: Authentic Indian home food, not restaurant food
4. **Legal Content**: Get actual legal review for T&C, Privacy Policy
5. **Dates**: Use current date for "Last Updated" fields

---

## 🎯 Success Metrics

1. **Razorpay Approval**: Website meets all payment gateway requirements
2. **Load Speed**: < 3 seconds on 3G connection
3. **Mobile Score**: 90+ on Google PageSpeed Insights
4. **App Downloads**: Increased user acquisition from website traffic

---

## 📌 Implementation Priority

1. **Phase 1** (Critical for Razorpay):
   - Home page with basic content
   - About Us page
   - Contact page with form
   - Privacy Policy page
   - Terms & Conditions page
   - Refund Policy page

2. **Phase 2** (Enhancement):
   - Better hero section with animations
   - Testimonials
   - Blog section (optional)
   - SEO optimization
